## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an [x]. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / refactor (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (`npm run lint` passes)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npx tsc --noEmit` passes)
- [ ] I have added / updated tests that prove my fix or feature works
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm run test` passes)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation where necessary
